title: Poster Localization
description: A reference-dependent localization series: one English infographic poster followed by Japanese, Korean, and Arabic versions that preserve the same layout, spacing, icons, and typographic hierarchy.
creative_direction: This package isolates the in-image translation workflow. Image 01 creates a clean English source poster; images 02-04 depend on it and replace only the text layer while keeping every visual container, icon, color block, and alignment decision stable.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Poster Localization
en.description: One English infographic poster is localized into Japanese, Korean, and Arabic while preserving the same visual system.

zh-CN.title: 海报本地化系列
zh-CN.description: 一张英文信息图海报被本地化为日文、韩文和阿拉伯文，同时保持同一套视觉系统。
